summary: Sprint testing: Login, Dashboard, AI Chat Widget, Loanbook, Cartera, Settings (Mercately & Alegra tabs), execute-action API. All 17 backend tests PASS. All critical UI flows verified.

integration_issues.flow: Settings - Auditoría tab for regular user
integration_issues.issue: Toast 'Error cargando auditoría' appears when non-admin user opens settings. Likely missing permission check on audit endpoint.

issues: Chat toggle btn is at y=1000 in 1080px viewport; programmatic .click() didn't work due to being near edge — JS click via evaluate() was required. Consider adding margin-bottom to the floating button so it's not cut off.

action_items: Minor: Add permission check on /api/audit endpoint for non-admin users (or suppress toast error for users without audit access)
critical_code_review_comments: Settings route in App.js is '/configuracion' but review_request mentioned '/settings' — navigation links may need updating in docs/review
Chat toggle button needs higher z-index or bottom margin to avoid being clipped by browser chrome on mobile viewports

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows pass; minor audit toast for user role)

seed_data_creation: None - Mercately test credentials saved to DB via test (test_key_123 / test_secret_456)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All sprint features verified working: Login (both users), Dashboard KPIs with date filter, AI Chat (¿Qué puedes hacer? general, causar arrendamiento with execution card, retención without execution card), execute-action returns 400 for registrar_entrega not found (bug fix confirmed), Loanbook (empty table, no errors), Cartera (Cola Remota, Semanal, Clientes tabs), Settings /configuracion (Mercately tab admin-only, Alegra credentials tab). Minor issue: audit error toast for non-admin user. Route for settings is /configuracion not /settings.
mocked_apis: Alegra en modo demo devuelve datos mock NIIF Colombia. Mercately es scaffold (no integración real). AI Chat usa Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations (real LLM responses confirmed).
